root.text: Welcome. I am Lysander. I will guide you through this mansion, but I cannot open the doors for you. You must prove your worth.

explain_mechanic.text: In each room, a barrier will block your path. I will give you a riddle. You must find the items in the room, combine them if necessary, and present the solution to me.

end_tutorial.text: Go now. Enter the Living Room and face your first trial.

root.text: The air here is heavy... This door requires a light that is pure. A normal flame will not suffice.

riddle_hint.text: Seek the wax that has never burned, and anoint it with the oil of the ancients. Combine them, and bring me the result.

root.text: Knowledge is power, but this history is torn apart. I cannot let you pass until the story is whole.

library_riddle.text: Find the scattered pages and the broken tome. Restore the book, and the way forward will open.

root.text: You have reached the Broken Kitchen, where this house once fed the living and now feeds on mistakes.I cannot let you move on until a worthy offering is prepared.

kitchen_mid.text: A restless chef haunts this place, waiting for an offering that is simple but worthy. Three ingredients lie scattered around you.

kitchen_riddle.text: Find the pieces that truly belong together, combine them into a humble meal, and present it to me. Only then will the way forward open.

root.text: This is the Assembly Room, a silent chamber where ancient magic lingers. You will not pass beyond this point until the key is made whole.

assembly_mid.text: The air hums with the power of the shattered key fragments you carry. You now hold all three fragments of the Liberation Key. Alone they are powerless.

assembly_hint.text: Combine the fragments into the restored Master Key, then return to me so we can test whether the final door will accept your freedom.

root.text: The walls breathe in this place. Even the pipes seem to whisper your name as you enter. I will not allow you to leave until you uncover what they are hiding.

laundry_mid.text: Something important was washed away here. Hidden where grime clings deepest.

laundry_riddle.text: Seek what is trapped between the drums. It will reveal the path forward.

root.text: Numbers linger here with purpose. They remember things that people forget.

storage_mid.text: Behind that vault lies a truth sealed long ago. Only the correct sequence will stir it awake.

storage_riddle.text: Study the fallen cubes. Patterns hide in silence. Find the correct code and bring it to me.

root.text: Heat reveals what cold conceals. The pipes here are never fully still.

boiler_mid.text: This room is alive. The floor remembers pain. Be mindful where you step.

boiler_riddle.text: A message is etched in metal. Trace the valves to uncover what must be pressed.

root.text: Secrets rest easier in the dark. Only those with steady hearts should disturb them.

secret_mid.text: Someone reached this place before you. They left something unfinished.

secret_riddle.text: Listen for the hollow space behind the rotted panels. What you reveal there will decide your fate.

root.text: This is the moment. The Master Key vibrates with power, glowing gold. Go, carry your freedom with pride. Few who enter this place ever walk out again.

game_completed_final.text: You have escaped the Mansion Beyond. Your courage restored the Master Key and shattered the ancient curse. You are free.
